I'll add my IsHash class at the end of _other.py and add IsHash to __init__.py's import list/__all__ alphabetically. Please do the same for IsPhoneNumber. Reply ACCEPT if ok.

Please do the same for IsHash. We'll git merge after committing, resolving any small conflicts in __init__.py's import/__all__ lines if they arise.
